{{Quote|I'm Arakyd Industries Security droid Z-58-0, Twi'lek|Zeeo|<ref name="Star Wars: Lethal Alliance">''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Z-58-0 security droid''', or '''Zeeo''', was a floating security [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufactured by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] that once worked for [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].

==Biography==
[[File:Z-58-0_shield.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Zeeo with shield enabled]]

He became the companion of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Rianna Saren]] after he saved her from a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]; she removed his [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolt]], and he offered her his database on Imperial computer systems. Zeeo worked alongside Rianna during her battle against the Imperial [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] [[Zarien Kheev]], and her investigation of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] project and proved himself to be very useful. On [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], he helped Rianna to steal an Imperial shipment; on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] he sliced the main computer of the [[Agricultural research vessel]] and gathered the intelligence on it's purpose; on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] he set the main drilling shaft on overdrive; on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] he helped Saren to defeat the rancor; on [[Despayre]] Zeeo downloaded the Imperial codes that allowed them to escape the Death Star and on [[Danuta]] he saved Rianna by sacrificially taking Zarien Kheev's final shot. He also opened numerous doors, deactivated alarms and force fields. Zeeo was also a good fighter, being capable to stun the enemies with electricity
and equipped with a powerful weapon–the [[Dual Cannon]]

==Behind the scenes==
The multiplayer feature in ''Lethal Alliance'' allows players to use multiple droids from Zeeo's class.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
